description: The team is great, and onboarding was smoother than expected.
author: Paul H.
pros: We helped research and deploy FetchKids in a few partner schools. They were the best-designed app for parents and schools to track complex schedules and authorized adults for pickups. We LOVED the arrival time functionality that allows us to line the students up in order of whose parent is first to arrive. In our daycares, it allows the providers to prepare the child and pack up their items for a smooth pickup as well. This app also has a broadcast communication tool; parents and dropoff/pickup teams can communicate in real time.
cons: They are still working on integrations into our bigger LMS providers.

description: Overall, this platform serves us well as a small after-school program. The communication team is open to our feedback and responsive to our questions.
author: Crystal B.
pros: We like that it is an affordable software system for our small organization. We also like that our account rep is very responsive to our needs and questions. The customer service via email is great.
cons: I wish there was a push notification option so we could message all enrolled or selected accounts. Generally the communication with accounts has areas where it could improve. We would love to see more user friendly or customizable reporting that we could do with the dashboard.

author: Elias B.
pros: The reason why we love fetch is because of how easy it is to have parent drop and pick up their kids!
cons: There are some features that are just simply not used for us but it is always good to know that they are still there!

review_title: Great communication and tracking tool between center and parents!
description: We have had a great experience with FetchKids. We had been looking for a product to help manage our Mother's Day Out and After School programs that was simple to use for both our center and the parents. We also wanted a tool that allowed us direct contact with parents without having to make numerous phone calls and playing phone tag. FetchKids also allows us to communicate with parents via our personal cell phones without having to give our our personal numbers. It has been a great addition to our programs.
author: Kim S.
pros: As a child activity center, we like the variety of options we have for keeping track of our students and communicating with our parents. FetchKids has alleviated our phone traffic and given us a way to streamline communications with our parents. It also allows gives us an estimated time of arrival for pick ups so that we have the kids ready to go when the pick up arrives.
cons: There are some features that are unavailable in the app and must be done from a desktop computer.

description: 10/10 Overall this has been a great addition to our program compared to the previous PikMyKid. I'm excited to see how it can improve our after school program.
author: Fatima B.
pros: That we are able to see when parents are on their way to pick up students. That there is a direct messaging system to parents. How easy the parent app is for them to use.
cons: Some features you can only access on a desktop - creating new student profiles -marking students calendar (absent)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Traci W.
pros: FetchKids has been a game-changer for the dismissal process of our after school program. Because parents can pick up their kids at any time within a 3 hour window, knowing when parents are coming has enabled us to have their child ready when they arrive saving everyone a lot of time and energy. The parents have provided overwhelming positive feedback on the efficiency of using the app. My late stay staff has reported they appreciate knowing when a child is getting picked up so they can assist the child in finishing homework, packing up or completing a task before leaving. There have also been times where it was incredibly helpful to have a record of who picked up a child. FetchKids' staff has been helpful, professional and reacts to our questions/need for help in a very timely manner.
cons: The only challenge to using FetchKids were for our Android users - often the predicted time of arrival was off by several minutes.

description: FetchKids is AWESOME for our camp use. With over 150 kids picking up within a 2 hour time frame, the app works wonders for limiting an excessive dismissal line and getting kids out the door quickly. We also use FetchKids for our after school program during the year. The app offers many different features (in addition to its real time dismissal function) that are very helpful such as attendance, alternative extracurriculars, broadcast messages etc.
author: Alaina L.
pros: The best part of FetchKids is the ease of pick ups for both the parents and staff in our program by giving real time updates on parent arrival time.
cons: The website at times is not the most user-friendly, in the sense that it is hard to locate the function I am looking for.

description: Overall, I wish this was something we had sooner. The ease of the app, for us and the parents, having the kids ready to leave when the parents get here, so they are not having to wait, has been fantasic.
author: Danielle V.
pros: The ease! When parents use the app the way they are supposed to, we can have the kids ready to walk right out the door as soon as the parents pull up.
cons: We have had just a couple parents not want to buy into it but they are the parents that we can't get to sign up for anything.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use and very functional!
description: Appreciate the ease of use and pickup functionality!
author: Kelly F.
pros: The pickup function! Works very well and like how it tracks the drive.
cons: Nothing comes to mind. Very satisfied overall!

author: melanie K.
pros: It's super easy to use for families and us as a business. I also love that you can text a family from it as well.
cons: I love everything about this app and website!!!

description: I love the app and the support from everyone that works there
author: Tara H.
pros: The app is so easy to use and very user friendly.
cons: Nothing. I really do love everything about the app.

description: My overall experience with FetchKids has been outstanding. The app is reliable, efficient, and extremely user-friendly. It has brought a new level of convenience to our daily schedule, making the pick-up process smoother and more organized. I highly recommend FetchKids!
author: Shiela C.
pros: What I appreciate most about FetchKids is its ability to significantly shorten pick-up times while maintaining the safety for my child. The app is user-friendly and facilitates seamless communication between parents and the school, making it exceptionally convenient.
cons: Honestly, everything works well for my needs, so I don't really have a con for this app. It meets all my expectations and makes the pick-up process incredibly smooth.

review_title: FetchKids helps make pick up time so much smoother! I don't know how we ever managed without it!
description: We finally do not have to wonder and guess when our parents are coming to pick up their children. Dismissal time has always been a guessing game but now it's not anymore! We are able to have the children ready for their parents to pick them up quickly and efficiently so that everybody can get home. We love this app and it was just what we were looking for to make pick-up time efficient and smooth.
author: Maria K.
pros: This app is super easy to use and very user friendly! Set up was done quickly and efficiently and I was able to use it right away. I love that we get real time updates because of the GPS technology!
cons: I wish that this app was integrated with our existing childcare app to streamline things for our staff and our parents.

review_title: Support for Classroom Teachers on Arrival of Family
description: We have loved using Fetch Kids. We started this in the Fall of 2020. The light was gong away and we could no longer see cars upon arrival. We were unable to have kids ready for their parents. Now, with using Fetch Kids we have the ability to see how long until our parents arrive, we can have children packed up and ready to go and then they leave in a timely manner. The classrooms are able to see all of this information to have children prepped. The parents enjoy having their kids ready to go with a smile! It has made the transition of not having parents in the building much easier and allowed us to prep!
author: Shauna B.
pros: We love that it beeps and you can see when a family will arrive. We love that the teachers can have students ready.
cons: It would be nice to separate families out more. When we have families that are divorced, we do not have the ability to send to both parents. It would be nice to have that option.

review_title: Amazing App-Easy to use, great time management, Efficient attendance tracking, and safe
author: Paola C.
pros: As administrator, makes drop off and pickups of students simple, on time, and always promote a professional communication with families. Every day when parents came to the school to pick up their child, I was able to coordinate on time with a very professional communication with families, pickups since parents can’t enter the building. Dismissal was fast and very efficient.
cons: The least was that i cant track attendance after dismissal one on one

description: Overall it's been a very good dismissal tool for us.
author: Michelle A.
pros: I like that FetchKids has a clean, easy-to-read interface.
cons: There have been some occasions when FetchKids shows a parent is several minutes away and then the parent calls our office to say they have been outside waiting for their kids for a while. I'm not sure if's an internet issue but it has caused some frustration. Parents are sometimes confused about how to add authorized drivers. I also would like to disable the "chat" feature because we don't check it and parents are under the impression that they can communicate with us through that tool.

review_title: Fetch Kids, its a great system for your school
author: Stacy D.
pros: Great way to check students in and out.
cons: Does provided a list who were not checked out of fetch kids at the end of the day.

review_title: Effective tool for attendance and dismissal
description: Prior to fetchkids we used parent pick-up numbers. Children forgot numbers and parents lost or forgot the number cards that were supposed to be on the vehicles. This required staff members outside with walkie-talkies calling out numbers so that indoor staff could start lining children up in order at the doors. Fetchkids eliminates those complications and streamlines dismisall.
author: Curtis C.
pros: The UI is excellent and easy to navigate.Fetchkids uses GPS to notify staff when parents are in the pick-up area making the process faster. Parents appreciate the instant pick-up notifications and added safety.
cons: App updates can be problematic. Some of the parents don't realize that the app needs to be updated. Others disable automatic updates because of data plan restrictions.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Desiree A.
pros: I like working with the support team to implement it, and will continue to use for our dismissal and after school pick up. :it’s accurate and effective.
cons: I would like to add more than one primary parent for each student because I feel that parents like to choose which one of them would like to be the primary parent. Easier to roll out to both

description: We had a very positive experience using FetchKids. The customer service was fast and very helpful.
author: Rachael M.
pros: As an administrator I liked that it gave real time ETA for our families at pickup time.
cons: The frequent updates made it difficult for some families to keep up with the app and it would lead to them not being able to check in/out their child

description: Very good - it is reliable and efficient, and the parents are happy.
author: Bernadette L.
pros: Fairly accurate GPS and the system is very reliable and I do not recall any service interruptions.
cons: Adding users is sometimes not intuitive for parents, so we end up having to answer questions

author: Sarah C.
pros: FetchKids is very easy to use, accurate, and has drastically reduced how long dismissal takes at the end of each day.
cons: NA - I highly recommend it. There is nothing I don't like about it.

description: All the business of making it convenient to pick up my kiddo.
author: Christopher C.
pros: Easy to use! User friendly! Consistent in efficiency!
cons: It was a little difficult registering for the app, but that was quickly rectified with a quick email to tech support.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Emma S.
pros: Such an easy app to use for both parents and admin! Very intuitive and easy for all ages.
cons: Sometimes on mobile devices the system accidentally clicks on another student to check out.
